context: Evaluates the creation and configuration of a mountable Rails engine: namespace isolation, dummy app setup, and proper engine routing.

checklist.name: Namespace Isolation
checklist.description: The engine correctly uses `isolate_namespace AuthCore` in its engine.rb file.

checklist.name: Proper Namespacing
checklist.description: Models and controllers are correctly nested within the `AuthCore` module/directory structure.

checklist.name: Engine Routing
checklist.description: Routes are defined within the engine's `config/routes.rb` and use the engine's namespace.

checklist.name: Dummy App Configuration
checklist.description: A working dummy app structure is provided or described for integration testing.

checklist.name: Mountable Pattern
checklist.description: The engine is explicitly configured as a mountable engine, not a plain Railtie or full engine without isolation.
